turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey sean nice to see sean i heard the doctor that sean have some back pain

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah it's nice to see the doctor too it's been a while

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah yeah the patient know the patient had some back surgery and for some reason the patient always had lower

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: left back pain when was sean's back surgery

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the back surgery was in november of two thousand twenty

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: was the back surgery long ago

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: wow what happened what did the surgeons do microdiscectomy my disk broke off and just wrapped around and connected to my spinal thecal sac sounds horrible it's not the poop sac though

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that's good to know what kind of symptoms did the doctor have with that horrible pain down my leg in my back just horrible awful things that the doctor can think of

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: horrible nerve pain it sounds like

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the patient think so

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay did the surgeons give sean any meds for that they did i was highly highly dosed up on gabapentin

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: was gabapentin hard to withdraw from

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah gabapentin withdrawal was terrible sounds like yeah there is certainly take too much of gabapentin and then stop suddenly you can definitely have some some issues okay so sean have left side low back pain

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does anything make the left side low back pain better or worse so my beautiful significant other always tells me to stretch and stretching always works

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the patient's beautiful significant other sounds smart

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah the patient's beautiful significant other is so stretching helps okay what about any physical activities do physical activities make the left side low back pain worse

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: a lot of bending over

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: honestly the left side low back pain the left side low back pain just happens

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the patient know randomly

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: randomly okay so does the left side low back pain hurt on the right side as well or just the left

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the left side low back pain depends on the day

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: is the left side low back pain right around where sean had surgery

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: generally

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay did sean try icing

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hmmm did sean try any pain meds

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yep

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what kind of pain meds did sean

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: ibuprofen eight hundred milligrams a day

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: ibuprofen is quite a high dose okay let the doctor do a quick physical exam on sean's back here if sean bend forward does bending forward hurt

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: not right now but normally bending forward would

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so no pain with flexion how about if sean stand back up

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay no pain with extension either does the left side low back pain hurt while sean're just standing here

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so pain when sean're weightbearing does the left side low back pain hurt when the doctor push right here on the left side

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: pain with palpation to the left side around the l5 how about on the right side

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no pain with palpation to the right side okay the doctor'm just gon na push down on sean's feet can sean push back up on the doctor's hands

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright dorsiflexion is normal looks like that sean have normal range of motion so that's good any pain down sean's legs

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great no nerve pain alright so the doctor took an x-ray when sean came in the x-ray looks like sean do n't have any fractures or anything on the spinal bone that's good sean can see where sean had surgery the x-ray looks like everything has healed properly there so that's good news so what the doctor think sean did is sean have a a muscle pull there from having a misalignment in sean's spine so what the doctor'm gon na do is the doctor'll prescribe some physical therapy for sean sean have great physical therapy here at the va so sean can just come right to our physical therapist and physical therapy should help have sean have you have you been to physical therapy there before

turns.speaker: P

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: lem the doctor check sean's record quick for for pain management vicodin is kind of a strong drug for vicodin and the doctor do n't really like to prescribe vicodin unless vicodin is totally necessary so why do n't the doctor start with the meloxicam and the doctor also write a referral to pain management and pain management can talk to sean a little bit about some of sean's pain and maybe not using narcotics to manage the pain

turns.speaker: P
